description: Track delivery of the TypeWeaver roadmap from scoring model through adversarial optimization. Source docs: docs/openspec-implementation-roadmap.md, docs/openspec-product.md, docs/openspec-scoring-model.md, docs/openspec-attack-matrix.md, docs/openspec-demo-flow.md.
notes: Use the roadmap milestone order. Favor evaluation-first, then repair, then generation, then closed-loop optimization.
title: Implement TypeWeaver product loop from OpenSpec roadmap
